description: Declares which stack variables this application or addon consumes and how they are applied to deployed instances when the stack value changes.

stacktype.description: Stacktype id (must match a file in json/stacktypes/).

name.description: Variable name, must match a stacktype.variables[].name.

replacement.description: Method applied when this stack property changes. 'manual' = user must act; 'no-action' = nothing to do (declaration is informational only); 'rerun-template' is DEPRECATED.

compose_key.description: For replacement='compose-env': the env key in docker-compose.yml.

lxc_var_name.description: For replacement='lxc-config-env': the variable name, written as lxc.environment.<NAME>=<VAL>.

script.description: For replacement='on-start-env': file name of the on-start script in ${VOLUME_DIR}/on_start.d/ to patch.

script_var.description: For replacement='on-start-env': the shell variable name inside the script whose value is patched.

template.description: For replacement='rerun-template' (deprecated): template filename to rerun.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation, shown in the UI. Especially helpful for 'no-action' and 'manual' entries.

check.description: Optional: template path that verifies the stack value matches the target system.
